_comment: Ground-truth latest GA versions for NetApp products. Updated by daily Reference Library scan (0 8 * * *). Edit this file manually if the scan agent identifies a newer GA release not yet reflected here. See CHANGELOG.md in the Reference Library for authoritative update history.

_sources.storageGrid: Cloud-BlueXP/README.md — storagegrid/release-notes/ verified 2026-07-22 (12.1 announced 2026-06-23, docs not yet live)

santricity.note: SANtricity OS (E-Series). Verify via mysupport.netapp.com/site/downloads/eseries — requires NetApp Support login.

spBmc._comment: SP/BMC firmware is hardware model-specific. NetApp best practice: always run the latest available version regardless of ONTAP release. The ONTAP-bundled catalog baseline is NOT the same as the globally latest available firmware.
spBmc.validationNote: Firmware currency cannot be confirmed without live API data. Validate installed version via ONTAP CLI: 'system service-processor show'. Download latest from mysupport.netapp.com/site/downloads.

SP.note: AFF/FAS Service Processor firmware — model-specific, verify via mysupport.netapp.com

BMC.note: AFF A-series / ASA / AFX Baseboard Management Controller firmware — model-specific, verify via mysupport.netapp.com

BIOS.note: System BIOS — bundled with ONTAP releases; verify via mysupport.netapp.com for standalone updates

diskFirmware._comment: Drive (disk) firmware is drive model-specific. NetApp best practice: always run the latest available drive firmware. Currency can only be confirmed against live fleet data from ActiveIQ or manual CLI comparison.
diskFirmware.validationNote: Validate via ONTAP CLI: 'storage disk show -fields firmware-revision'. Download latest Disk Qualification Package (DQP) and drive firmware from mysupport.netapp.com.

shelfFirmware._comment: Shelf module firmware (IOM, NSM, ESM) is module-model-specific. NetApp best practice: always run the latest available shelf firmware.
shelfFirmware.validationNote: Validate via ONTAP CLI: 'storage shelf show -fields module-type,fw-version'. Download latest from mysupport.netapp.com.
